objective: Exercise the screen_state_matrix_packet candidate template with a minimal valid instance.

sections.INTENT: Model the dashboard onboarding screen states before any generic implementation starts.

SCREEN_STATES.description: Initial data fetch while route and permissions resolve.
No projects or no visible records for the current user.
Fetch or permission resolution failure with retry affordance.
Dashboard populated with summary cards, table, and activity feed.
Authenticated user lacks role for admin-only actions.

COMPONENT_CONTRACTS.testable_obligation: renders exactly one primary state region
loading and zero values have distinct render states
announces blocked action and does not expose destructive controls

A11Y_GATES: loading state uses aria-busy on main region
error state exposes retry button with descriptive label
permission state communicates role limitation without color-only signaling
TEST_GATES: unit tests cover loading, empty, error, success, and permission states
component contract tests verify action visibility by user role
keyboard navigation reaches retry and primary actions
NON_CLAIMS: This is a candidate UI state matrix, not accepted product state.
No design-system authority is claimed beyond the provided context.
sections.SETTLEMENT_ROUTE: UI_ARCHITECT reviews before COMPONENT_BUILDER implementation packet.

proves: required section shape can be satisfied

non_claims: This instance is candidate current-context test data, not accepted template law.
This instance does not execute external tools or mutate production state.
